parameters.subject: 🚨 AI Voice Agent Alert: Unhandled Lead Classification Detected
parameters.message:
=
🚨 Workflow Attention Required

The AI Voice Agent workflow received a lead that could not be routed to any configured category. This indicates an unexpected value or workflow configuration issue that requires review.

Customer {{ $json.customer_name }}
Business {{ $json.business_name }}
Phone {{ $json.phone }}
Call Outcome {{ $json.call_outcome }}
Received Final Tag {{ $json.final_tag }}
Sentiment {{ $json.sentiment }}

Validation Summary

{{ $json.short_call_summary }}

Recommended Action

Review the workflow configuration and verify that the final_tag value is supported by the routing logic before processing this lead further.

This email was automatically generated by the AI Voice Agent workflow because an unexpected routing condition occurred.

value.notes: Future opportunity - Add to nurture campaign.
Reached voicemail. Customer unavailable. Callback required.
Wrong contact reached. Verify customer phone number or contact details before the next call.
Customer is not interested at this time. No further action required unless circumstances change.
Customer requested to be added to the Do Not Call list. Future outbound calls must not be made.
Lead routed to fallback branch. Review final_tag and workflow routing configuration.
Customer provided feedback. Review and respond if necessary.

parameters.content:
Input Validation

Validates required fields before CRM logging.

CRM Logging

Appends validated customer summaries to the CRM Leads sheet.

Lead Routing

Routes leads by final_tag.

Sales Notifications

Sends notifications for Hot, Warm, Future, Voicemail, Wrong Contact, and Fallback scenarios.

CRM Status Updates

Updates status, owner, notes, and follow-up fields.

Error Handling

Validation errors and workflow execution errors are logged separately.
